meta.task: FIX-4 constructibility tripwire fixture (V3 kalshi_robustness.md section 2.4-1, judge-mandated)
sources: docs/calibration/containment_probe/taxonomy.json (2026-07-11, 50-shape universe; impossible side-mix semantics per shape)
docs/calibration/containment_probe/exchange_matrix.json (2026-07-11 validator probes P01-P42/F/R/M/N; per-cell BLOCKED verdicts cited on each cell below)

tape ticker shapes verified read-only from data/combomaker-prod.sqlite3 rfqs 2026-07-11 (KXWNBAPTS---, KXUFCROUNDS--, KXUFCMOF--, KXUFCFIGHT--, KXPGATOP20--

)
meta.semantics: every cell is a semantically-IMPOSSIBLE shape x side-mix (its YES can never settle) that is exchange-BLOCKED today and NOT intercepted by the shipped impossibility families; a live RFQ matching one is proof the Kalshi validator loosened
meta.verdict: IMPOSSIBLE farmable=False with note 'taxonomy-impossible tripwire: <shape>' - decline + count, never a copula price, never a farm (fixture-driven certainty is not an airtight in-code proof)

excluded.S23, S25: stage-conditional implications (extra-time contexts break them) - not unconditionally impossible, never pinned
excluded.S49: tennis tournament-win => match-win is CROSS-scope (tournament and match carry different game codes); the tripwire scans same-game pairs only and no verified same-scope ticker key exists - documented residual (prices at cross_event_rho=0 as before)
excluded.S1, S2, S3(M=N), S6, S7, S8, S12, S13, S: already IMPOSSIBLE via the shipped families in relationships.py, which own their farmable verdicts and run before the tripwire

meta.leg_pattern_fields: side (yes|no, required); type (LegType value); series_is/series_has/series_lacks (series-prefix matchers); suffix_in/suffix_not_in (last-segment literal sets); suffix_team (last segment parses TEAM+optional-digits, draw tokens excluded); line/line_ge/line_le (parsed ticker line); requires_line
meta.relations: same_team | diff_team (digit-stripped suffix teams; within ONE game two team suffixes are drawn from that game's two-team vocabulary) | same_entity (segment-2 player/entity equality) | line_a_gt_b | line_a_ge_b | line_a_lt_b
